name: Cinergy Corp.
description: Cinergy Corp. was a major electric and gas utility company based in Cincinnati, Ohio, formed in 1994 through the merger of Cincinnati Gas & Electric Company and PSI Resources, Inc. It operated regulated public utilities in Ohio, Indiana, and Kentucky, serving millions of customers. In April 2006, Cinergy Corp. merged with Duke Energy, with the combined entity continuing under the Duke Energy name, making Cinergy a wholly-owned subsidiary of Duke Energy.
